description: A ground-level photograph depicts an open, undeveloped plot of land primarily covered in dry, yellowish-brown grass and sparse green weeds or bushes. In the immediate foreground, a wire fence is visible with some dry plant matter tangled in its mesh. The midground is dominated by the large, uncultivated area, appearing as a "Land without current use" or waste land. In the background, two residential buildings are visible: a light-coloured house on the left and a distinctive yellow house on the right. Between the houses and further back, a tall, lattice-structure antenna tower stands prominently against a clear, light blue sky. Several trees and shrubs are also visible in the background, delineating the edge of the undeveloped plot from the residential area.
